itinerary.title: Arrival in Darjeeling and Evening at Leisure
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Bagdogra Airport (IXB) or New Jalpaiguri Railway Station (NJP), meet our representative and take a scenic drive to the mountain town of Darjeeling (approx. 3-4 hours, 70 km). Check in at your hotel and spend the evening enjoying a relaxing stroll around Mall Road or Chowrasta.

itinerary.title: Tiger Hill Sunrise and Darjeeling Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Set off early in the morning (around 4:00 AM) to Tiger Hill to witness the sunrise over Mount Kanchenjunga and the Everest range. On the way back, visit the Batasia Loop toy train viewpoint and the historic Ghoom Monastery. After breakfast, visit the Peace Pagoda, the Padmaja Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park to see red pandas and snow leopards, and the Himalayan Mountaineering Institute. Spend your evening shopping at Mall Road.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling Toy Train Ride and Tea Estate Tour
itinerary.description: Enjoy a morning joyride on the historic Darjeeling Toy Train from Darjeeling to Ghoom, a UNESCO World Heritage experience. In the afternoon, visit a working tea estate to learn about tea cultivation, pluckers, and tea tasting. You can optionally visit the Happy Valley Tea Estate or Lloyd's Botanical Garden.

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Mirik Lake or Leisure Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. You can opt for a day trip to Mirik (80 km round trip) to see the Sumendu Lake, walk through orange orchards and cardamom plantations, and see the tea gardens of Thurbo and Singbulli. Alternatively, enjoy a free day in Darjeeling to visit the Rock Garden and Gangamaya Park, or relax at a local cafe.

itinerary.title: Departure from Darjeeling
itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out of your hotel and take a comfortable private transfer back to Bagdogra Airport or NJP Station for your return journey.

title: Darjeeling Delight
description: Experience the scenic beauty of the Queen of the Hills on this 5-day Darjeeling tour package. Cover spectacular Himalayan views, historic tea estates, the iconic Toy Train joyride, and cultural landmarks.
highlights: Scenic drive to Darjeeling and relaxation at Mall Road
Tiger Hill sunrise view over Mount Kanchenjunga
Ride the UNESCO-listed Darjeeling Toy Train to Ghoom
Day trip excursion to the picturesque Sumendu Lake in Mirik
